$ python ieee64.py '"1" + ("0" * 100)'
    expr:   "1" + ("0" * 100)
    in:     10000000000000000159028911097599180468360808563945281389781327557747838772170381060813469985856815104.000000000000000000000000000000
    out:    10000000000000000159028911097599180468360808563945281389781327557747838772170381060813469985856815104.000000000000000000000000000000
    hex:    54B249AD2594C37D
    binary: 0101010010110010010010011010110100100101100101001100001101111101
    raw:    sign s: 0  exponent:   1355  mantissa:         643957962097533
    denary: sign:   +  exponent e:  332  mantissa m: 1.1429873912822750004

    s eeeeeeeeeee mmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmmm
    0 10101001011 0010010010011010110100100101100101001100001101111101
